steps.title: Find the center
steps.content:
The points $(12,10)$ and $(12,4)$ are vertically aligned, so their midpoint is
$$
(12,\frac{10+4}{2})=(12,7)
$$
The point $(9,7)$ is the same distance from this midpoint, so the center is $(12,7)$.

steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content:
The distance from $(12,7)$ to $(12,10)$ is
$$
10-7=3
$$
So the radius is $3$.

steps.title: Compute the circumference
steps.content: Use the circumference formula. $$ C=2\pi r=2\pi(3)=6\pi $$ Since $C=k\pi$, $k=6$. The answer is B.
